title_it: Why the "Orbital Cloud" is the next $1T infrastructure play
title_en: Why the "Orbital Cloud" is the next $1T infrastructure play
excerpt_it: La corsa agli armamenti dell'AI ha raggiunto un limite terrestre. Data center orbitali in LEO offrono energia solare 24/7 a $0.01/kWh, costi di lancio sub-$100/kg con veicoli Starship-class, e un vantaggio competitivo unico: il "Sovereign Compute" al di fuori delle giurisdizioni terrestri.
excerpt_en: The AI arms race has hit a terrestrial ceiling. Orbital data centers in LEO offer 24/7 solar energy at $0.01/kWh, sub-$100/kg launch costs with Starship-class vehicles, and a unique competitive moat: "Sovereign Compute" outside traditional terrestrial jurisdictions.
